steps.step: Totals engine — 13/3/69 fixture: all 20 column totals + grand 446 + NoteLine qty excluded (A3)
steps.notes: 6/6. Red-first confirmed (module-missing failure before impl). Grand==446; column sum==446; notes qty (1+20) provably excluded (type-level).
5/5. Red-first confirmed. Intl en-US-u-ca-buddhist via formatToParts (strips ' BE' era suffix).

steps.step: Snapshot carry-forward mergeSnapshots — naive re-derive FAILS (C1b)
steps.notes: 3/3. Pre-existing cell keeps OldName; brand-new cell gets fresh live name; empty-string fallback.

steps.step: Every order action calls requireAuth (ELEV-guard, C4)
steps.notes: 5/5. orders/actions.ts added to MODULES; createOrderSheet + saveOrderSheet both call requireAuthState.
39/39 across 10 files (was 24; +15: totals 6, be-date 5, order-save 3, auth-guard +1).

steps.step: D1 hybrid — enter 13/3/69 through the UI, save, reload, totals persist 446
steps.notes: Live grand-total 446 pre-save; post-reload 446; per-column footer 4->137, 8->82, 2->99. Reuses e2e/.auth/staff.json.

steps.step: D2 hybrid — rename confirmed shop, re-save, snapshot preserved (boundary/lock branch)
steps.notes: After rename+resave, orderLine.shopNameAtEntry == original name while shop.name == renamed. Distinguishes carry-forward from naive re-derive (deviation: used confirmed-lock shop, the distinguishing branch). Sandbox shop name restored after test.

steps.step: Full E2E regression (Phase-03 auth specs + Phase-04 orders)

knownGaps: Total weight ships (computeTotalWeight) but is NOT validated vs 4,670 kg / 163 pip — per-variant weightKg/pipConversion null until customer Q22. Backlog: weight-factors_NOTE.
Duplicate-sheet TOCTOU under truly concurrent saves — no DB unique on date+location (decision 3); accepted residual (LAN-internal, low concurrency).

evlConfirmation.note: Unconditional re-run of the exact validate-contract gates (NOT diff-aware). Prior execute evidence treated as unconfirmed hypothesis and re-verified.

gates.notes: 39/39 across 10 files. Read test code: totals.test.ts asserts all 20 columns (loop 1-20) + grand 446 + column-sum 446 + note-exclusion (noteQtySum 21 provably not in 446). order-save.test.ts genuinely fails a naive re-derive (asserts OldShop survives a rename).
9/9. D1 fixture round-trip 446 + D2 confirmed-shop rename->resave snapshot preservation. CredentialsSignin log lines are the intentional SEC-enum bad-credential test, not failures.

13/3/69 sheet id=5: 51 OrderLines, grand total 446, column totals {2:99,3:14,4:137,5:21,6:39,7:4,8:82,9:2,17:38,18:10} match fixture exactly. Zero empty shopNameAtEntry/variantNameAtEntry. Zero qty<=0 lines. D1 spec entered grid only (no NoteLines) so orphan-note not exercised — consistent with D1 grid-only 446 scope.
Counts stable before/after re-seed: shops 25, products 22, variants 28, users 2.

deviationAudit.deviation: D2 uses confirmed-lock shop (not contract's unconfirmed)
deviationAudit.verdict: JUSTIFIED — test-strengthening. Confirmed branch is the only end-to-end case distinguishing carry-forward from naive re-derive; unconfirmed branch covered by C1b pure unit. Verified in e2e/orders.spec.ts (asserts snapshot==original while live==renamed).

deviationAudit.deviation: note match indicator server-side only, no UI badge
deviationAudit.verdict: CONFIRMED as documented. actions.ts saveOrderSheet exact off-list text match sets productVariantId AND keeps raw text (lines 157/160/164). Follow-up UI badge recommended, not gated.
CONFIRMED correct. be-date.ts uses en-US-u-ca-buddhist; be-date.test.ts asserts yearBE 2569 + '69'. ASCII digits per form.
